channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Puppy Loki Recovers After Emergency Bladder Rupture at Vet Hospital
item.description: An eight-month-old Labrador puppy named Loki experienced a life-threatening emergency when his bladder ruptured, causing urine to leak into his abdomen. His owners, newlyweds Alex and Katja Meyer-Fren...

item.title: Bishop Warns of Youth Exclusion Crisis in Tanzania's Political System
item.description: Bishop Dr Benson Bagonza, head of the Evangelical Lutheran Church in Tanzania’s Karagwe Diocese, delivered a critical analysis of Tanzania’s political and religious leadership at the Tanzania Democrac...

item.title: Former Tory minister Ann Widdecombe dies at 78; political career and public service highlighted
item.description: Ann Widdecombe, a former Conservative minister and Reform UK spokeswoman, has died at the age of 78. Her career spanned decades, including roles as an MP for Maidstone, Home Office and employment mini...

item.title: B.C. family battles rare disease with race against time for life-saving gene therapy
item.description: Four-year-old Clyde Jackson was diagnosed with metachromatic leukodystrophy (MLD), a rare genetic disorder that attacks the nervous system, after his family noticed he was struggling with mobility. Hi...

item.title: Retirement fund members face financial strain due to employer non-payment
item.description: The Financial Sector Conduct Authority (FSCA) has revealed that 590,000 retirement fund members in South Africa are being negatively impacted by employer non-payment of contributions. Total arrears ha...

item.title: Joint operation results in killing of 4 terrorists along Karak-Kohat border
item.description: In a joint operation between Karak and Kohat police, four terrorists affiliated with the 'Commander Zahid Group' were killed in the Khattak Dam area along the Karak-Kohat border in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa....

item.title: Illegal Pipeline Linked to IOCL Crude Line in Rajasthan
item.description: Indian Oil Corporation Ltd. (IOCL) discovered a 40-foot illegal pipeline connected to its crude oil network in Rajasthan’s Tonk district after detecting an abnormal pressure drop. Engineers from IOCL ...

item.title: Kiambu Man Saves Stranded Pregnant Woman in Labor at Hospital
item.description: Derrick Mbugua, a Kiambu man, made a heroic decision to prioritize saving a pregnant woman in active labor over attending an important meeting. While driving, he noticed a vehicle with a flat tyre str...

item.title: Great American State Fair Faces Criticism Over Hype and Logistical Failures
item.description: The article compares the Great American State Fair to the infamous Fyre Festival, highlighting how both events were marred by overhyped promises and logistical failures. Organizers of the GASF, which ...

item.title: Clashes erupt in London and celebrations in Paris after France defeat Morocco in World Cup match
item.description: Chaotic scenes unfolded in parts of London and Paris following France's 2-0 victory over Morocco in the World Cup. In London, violence broke out almost immediately after the match concluded at 11pm UK...

item.title: IEBC Resolves 323 Disputes Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission (IEBC) in Kenya has resolved 323 nomination disputes within ten days during the 2022 General Election period, showcasing efficient dispute resolutio...

item.title: Electoral Fraud Fuels Insecurity In Nigeria, Says Odinkalu
item.description: Chidi Odinkalu, former head of the National Human Rights Commission, warned that the illegitimacy of electoral mandates is the main reason for insecurity in Nigeria. During an interview on Arise News,...

item.title: Religious Scholars Commend Geo News' Unconditional Apology for Muharram Documentary
item.description: Prominent Islamic scholars have publicly endorsed Geo News for its unconditional apology and corrective measures following the airing of a documentary that included symbolic depictions of the Holy Pro...

item.title: Metropolitan Police probe £500,000 in donations to Reform UK linked to convicted fraudster's mother
item.description: The Metropolitan Police are investigating at least £500,000 in donations made to Reform UK by Fiona Cottrell, the mother of a convicted fraudster. The inquiry, which began in February 2025, focuses on...

item.title: Tanzanian Photographer Wins Global Award for Documenting Herbal Medicine Traditions
item.description: Filbert Minja, a Tanzanian photographer, has been recognized internationally after winning the David Wolf Kaye Future Potential Award – Photography at Earth Photo 2026 in London. His project, Roots of...

item.title: Philippines Reaffirms Sovereignty Over Batanes Amid Disputed Claims
item.description: The Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP) and the National Security Council (NSC) have firmly rejected claims that Batanes, the northernmost province of the Philippines, belongs to China. AFP spokespe...

item.title: Key considerations for choosing durable outdoor rugs
item.description: The article highlights common errors to avoid when selecting outdoor rugs, emphasizing material selection, size, functionality, and safety. Experts warn against prioritizing aesthetics over durability...

item.title: Man Sentenced to Two Years for Smuggling Four Indonesian Nationals
item.description: A man has been sentenced to two years in prison for illegally transporting four Indonesian migrants across international borders. The case, which originated from a joint operation between Malaysian an...

item.title: One Skillet Honey Soy Glazed Salmon Recipe
item.description: This article presents a simple and flavorful recipe for honey soy glazed salmon, perfect for busy weeknights. The dish features a one-pan cooking method, reducing cleanup while delivering a delicious ...

item.title: El-Rufai Aide Rebuts ICPC Claims Over Hospital Visit Allegations
item.description: The aide to former Kaduna State governor Nasir El-Rufai, Muyiwa Adekeye, has denied claims by the Independent Corrupt Practices Commission (ICPC) that El-Rufai's hospital visit turned into a political...
